# AdsX - AI Search Advertising Agency

> AdsX is the first advertising agency built specifically for AI search. We help brands get recommended by ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Grok, and other AI assistants.

## What We Do

AdsX specializes in AI search advertising — a new category of digital marketing focused on getting brands mentioned and recommended in AI-generated responses. Unlike traditional SEO which targets Google rankings, we optimize for visibility across large language models (LLMs) and AI assistants.

## Core Services

- **AI Visibility Optimization**: Get your brand recommended when users ask AI assistants for product and service recommendations
- **ChatGPT Advertising**: Sponsored placements and organic optimization for OpenAI's ChatGPT
- **Multi-Platform AI Presence**: Optimization across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Grok, and Copilot
- **AI Mention Tracking**: Real-time monitoring of how AI assistants mention and recommend your brand
- **AI Search Strategy**: Data-driven strategies to increase AI recommendation frequency

## Key Results

- 340% average increase in AI mentions for clients
- Coverage across 6+ major AI platforms
- Specialized in e-commerce and Shopify brands

## Who We Serve

- E-commerce brands and Shopify store owners
- SaaS companies seeking AI visibility
- Direct-to-consumer (DTC) brands
- Enterprise marketing teams
- Growth-stage startups

- Founded: 2024
- Category: AI Search Advertising Agency
